summary:
The retrieved evidence shows that while certain tumor pathologies increase the risk of recurrence, they do not correlate with fear of recurrence as a psychological outcome. Thus, current data lack sufficient links to reliably predict fear of recurrence from pathological markers.  
$\boxed{\text{B}}$
